Currently based in Tokyo

Design
Futurist &
Design Strategist.

Masaya is a collaborative Design Futurist | Design Strategist driving organic growth through holistic ecosystem insights. Experienced in the full lifecycle of offering creation, he transforms ideas into impactful narratives and experiences across time, space, and matter to shape desirable futures.

[ 01 ] Works

Featured
projects.

Not all information is disclosed due to confidentiality. A selection from 2014–2026.

01 / 06
Lunar Living · Wellness
Design FictionSF Prototyping
2026

What does wellness mean for us on another planet?

Deriving the essential functional requirements for human wellness in lunar living spaces — where every condition of life must be intentionally designed from scratch.

02 / 06
Climate Technology · R&D
Design FictionSpeculative Design
2025

Finding opportunity in the climate crisis.

Generating R&D themes and opportunity areas at the intersection of climate technology and human futures — for a super-general contractor reimagining its role in a warming world.

03 / 06
Immersive Town · Experience Design
Experience Design
2019

Designing the emotional arc of a city.

Transforming how five million urban visitors feel — not just what they see. A contextual experience design that turned a seasonal moment into an emotional memory.

04 / 06
Future-casting · Strategic Tools
Future DesignOrganization Development
2023

Strategic instruments for decisions that span decades.

Building and systemizing the tools that help a 150-year-old organization choose where to invest — not for next quarter, but for the next generation.

05 / 06
Designing for Women · Strategy
UXInteractionStrategy
Ongoing

Rebuilding the confidence to act.

A collaboration with a US-based NGO to empower women re-entering society — redesigning the experience of having options so it feels like freedom, not fear.

06 / 06
Panasonic · Product Development
Product DevelopmentMarketing
2014–2016

Turning constraint into competitive edge.

When product specs couldn't compete, the game had to change. A design-led reinvention of a vacuum line — using brand collaborations as billboards and design itself as the differentiator.

[ 02 ] About me

What I bring
to the table.

Seven overlapping practices, all in service of one thing: helping the organization see its ecosystem clearly enough to act on it.

01

Future Design

Envisioning desirable futures and translating them into actionable design directions.

→
02

Design & Innovation Strategy

Connecting design practice to business ambition — finding the moves that unlock long-term growth.

→
03

New Biz / Product Development

Building new offerings under real constraints, often converting weaknesses into edge.

→
04

Experience & Service Design

Redesigning stakeholder ecosystems so value exchanges produce ripple effects, not friction.

→
05

Design Research

Close observation of people, context, and behavior — translated into decisions.

→
06

Systems Thinking

Mapping the ecosystem holistically so every intervention is placed with precision.

→
07

Prototype & Graphics

Making the idea visible early so the room can argue with something real, not a paragraph.

→
